# neon_recover_project (Action)

Recovers a deleted Neon project during the deletion grace period.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "neon_recover_project" "example" {
  project_id = "proj-example-id"
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID to recover.
